description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a complex, multi-faceted dark gray hip roof and a predominantly white and gray exterior. The structure features expansive balconies and terraces, with glass railings and large windows that allow for ample natural light. The front includes a covered porch with steps leading up, flanked by landscaped greenery and mature trees. On one side, there is a spacious patio area with a swimming pool and outdoor seating, while the other side has a driveway and additional green space. The rear of the house showcases more balconies and a mix of window sizes, emphasizing the open, airy design. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a dark multi-faceted roof, expansive balconies, large windows, and a poolside patio, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with steps, covered porch, and landscaped trees, highlighting the geometric roof and front balconies.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the house, extensive balconies, and the pool area with outdoor seating and cabanas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, multiple trees, and the back facade with large windows and balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional balconies, a driveway, and more green space, with the complex roof structure visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, covered porch, and minimalist columns, flanked by landscaped greenery
